case_title: JOSE ANSELMO VS. FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF DORIN E. HOHL AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS FOR FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED JAN-15-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-27-2015 - JUDGMENT.
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM DEFENDANT FILED BY DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-27-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-27-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY LESLIE EISENHAUER--PERSONAL LINES UNDERWRITING SPECIALIST. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANSELMO, JOSE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,550.00 FILED BY ANSELMO, JOSE AS TO DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-27-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: DOREN E. HOHL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANSELMO, JOSE AS TO DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY, INC.
